goal: Implement to-do items with Codex 5.3 until the docs/status non-GA backlog is cleared. Non-GA means open items in docs/status/* excluding GA Blocker §1 (MutationProposal accept/undo). Tranche by tranche: merge handoffs, extend plan for the next scoped slice, keep AGENTS.md status hygiene (strike todos + product-done rows).
summary: Wave 4 (Codex 5.3): header logo + AI live regions a11y, board error/empty states, taskModal canonical types, useAgent tool-resolver extract, suggested-by-copilot badge, forgot-password link stub.
acceptanceCriteria: Each worker branch merges cleanly; backlog docs reflect closed slices per AGENTS.md
FE workers pass eslint, tsc, CI=true jest, vite build
BE-affecting workers pass pytest + ruff in backend/

tasks.name: header-logo-and-ai-live-regions-a11y
tasks.scopedGoal: Address ui-todo §21 remaining a11y items: give the header logo button a distinct accessible label (so AT users don't confuse it with the `Members` control next to it) and extend `aria-live="polite"` regions to `AiTaskAssistPanel` and `BoardBriefDrawer` so AT users hear suggestion arrival/error parity with `AiChatDrawer`.
tasks.brief: Header logo: add `aria-label`/`title` like `microcopy.header.logoLabel` (`Pulse home`, with zh-CN parity) on the existing logo button so it announces distinct from `Members`. AI live regions: add a discrete `<div role="status" aria-live="polite">` (or use AntD `<Spin>` wrappers' aria) inside `AiTaskAssistPanel` and `BoardBriefDrawer` that announces succinct status changes (e.g. `Suggestion ready`, `Couldn't load brief`) without leaking raw payloads. Tests: extend `src/__tests__/uiAccessibility.strict.test.tsx` (or component tests) to assert the new affordances. Update `docs/status/ui-todo.md` §21 + Phase 3.4 4.1.3 lines.
acceptance: Header logo button exposes a distinct accessible label / title; tests assert it
AiTaskAssistPanel and BoardBriefDrawer expose a polite live region for status announcements
ui-todo §21 + Phase 3.4 4.1.3 rows updated to reflect the change
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: board-error-empty-states
tasks.scopedGoal: Address ui-todo §16 remaining: bring board page error + empty states up to project-list parity. Add a top-of-board `<Alert>` + Retry button when `useReactQuery("boards" | "tasks")` errors; replace the zero-column collapse-to-creator state with a stronger illustrated `<EmptyState>` (reusing the existing component if present, otherwise a minimal one) before falling back to the column creator.
tasks.brief: Mirror the existing pattern in `src/pages/project.tsx` for fetch-failure Alerts. For the empty-board case, render an `<EmptyState>` (or a minimal helper if the component family doesn't expose a board-shaped variant yet) above the column creator with a clear CTA (`Create your first column`). Update tests under `src/pages/board.test.tsx` (and add a new error-state test) to cover both branches. Update `docs/status/ui-todo.md` §16 row to reflect parity.
acceptance: Board fetch failure renders a top-of-board `<Alert>` with Retry that re-runs the React Query
Zero-column board renders an EmptyState above (or instead of) the column creator with i18n parity
Tests cover both happy + error + empty branches
ui-todo §16 row updated to reflect shipped parity
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: taskmodal-canonical-types
tasks.scopedGoal: Address ui-todo §10 remaining / Phase 2.6 bullet: hard-code the canonical `Task` / `Bug` options in `TaskModal`'s Type select instead of rebuilding the option list from `tasks?.map(...)`. The schema only allows those two values, so dataset inference is just a footgun.
tasks.brief: Replace the dataset-derived option list (today around `src/components/taskModal/index.tsx:35–41` / `:149–166`) with a constant that mirrors the schema. Localize via `microcopy.options.taskTypes.*` (already exists per recent column work). Add a test asserting that the select renders both options regardless of dataset shape (including when there are no tasks of one of the types). Update `docs/status/ui-todo.md` §10 / Phase 2.6 row.
acceptance: Task / Bug options always render in the modal Type select regardless of dataset shape
Tests cover the empty / single-type dataset cases
ui-todo §10 / Phase 2.6 row updated to reflect the canonical-type fix
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: useagent-tool-resolver-extract
tasks.scopedGoal: Continue release-todo §16b / architecture-todo Theme 3: extract the FE-tool registry + auto-resume loop from `src/utils/hooks/useAgent.ts` into a dedicated `useAgentToolResolver` hook (or `src/utils/agent/toolResolver.ts` module) so `useAgent` no longer owns tool execution + auto-resume logic.
tasks.brief: Lift the FE-tool resolution sequence (registry lookup, async invocation, auto-resume call into the agent stream) into a stable hook with explicit inputs (registry, autonomy, threadId, last interrupt) and outputs (status, error). Re-export the public surface from `useAgent.ts` if any callers reference it directly. Keep behavior 1:1 — no semantic changes to autonomy handling, FE-tool execution, or auto-resume timing. Add or extend tests under `src/utils/hooks/useAgent.test.tsx` (or a new `useAgentToolResolver.test.ts`). Update `docs/status/release-todo.md` §16b sub-bullet (continue partial closure) and `docs/status/architecture-todo.md` Theme 3 row.
acceptance: FE-tool registry + auto-resume loop is no longer defined inline in useAgent.ts; new module owns it
useAgent.ts shrinks measurably (target ≥ 50 LOC reduction in the tool-resolver block)
Existing useAgent tests pass with import-path adjustments only; no behavioral regression
release-todo §16b sub-bullet + architecture-todo Theme 3 reflect the additional partial closure
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: aitaskassistpanel-suggested-by-copilot-badge
tasks.scopedGoal: Address ui-todo 2.A.8 partial: after a user clicks Apply on the AI story-point suggestion in `AiTaskAssistPanel`, mark the affected task field with a small `Suggested by Copilot` badge until the user edits the field.
tasks.brief: Track `appliedFieldOrigin` per field in the modal/parent state (or via local state in the panel for story points specifically). When the user edits the field, drop the badge. Use a small AntD `Tag` or `Tooltip` adjacent to the field with `microcopy.ai.suggestedByCopilot` (en + zh-CN). Add a unit test asserting badge presence after Apply and disappearance on edit. Update `docs/status/ui-todo.md` 2.A.8 row to reflect the partial closure.
acceptance: After Apply on the story-point estimate, a `Suggested by Copilot` badge renders next to the field
Editing the field clears the badge
i18n keys exist in en + zh-CN
ui-todo 2.A.8 row updated for the partial closure
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass

tasks.name: forgot-password-link-stub
tasks.scopedGoal: Address ui-todo §11 remaining: add a `Forgot password?` link on the login form pointing to a placeholder `/auth/forgot-password` route page (TODO copy, no real flow yet). Wire i18n + tests; do not regress the existing show-password / caps-lock / autoComplete behavior.
tasks.brief: Place the link near the password field (right-aligned). Route the link to `/auth/forgot-password` rendered by a tiny new placeholder page that says `microcopy.auth.forgotPasswordPlaceholderTitle` + body `microcopy.auth.forgotPasswordPlaceholderBody`. zh-CN parity required. Add tests asserting the link renders, focuses, and the placeholder route renders. Update `docs/status/ui-todo.md` §11 + Phase 2.7 row to reflect the partial closure.
acceptance: Login form shows a `Forgot password?` link with i18n + accessible name
`/auth/forgot-password` renders a placeholder page (en + zh-CN)
Tests cover link presence + route render
ui-todo §11 + Phase 2.7 row updated to reflect partial closure
eslint + tsc + CI=true jest + vite build pass
